zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Brockholes於1365年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓時，她的父親Nicholas de Brockholes31歲，母親Margaret30歲。她於1395年與Thomas de Singleton在英國藍卡爾布洛可爾斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1425年在英國藍卡爾布洛可爾斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Brockholes于1365年出生在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓时，她的父亲Nicholas de Brockholes31岁，母亲Margaret30岁。她于1395年与Thomas de Singleton在英国藍卡爾布洛可爾斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1425年在英国藍卡爾布洛可爾斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Brockholes was born in 1365, in Preston, Lancashire, England, her father, Nicholas de Brockholes, was 31 and her mother, Margaret, was 30. She married Thomas de Singleton in 1395, in Brockholes, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1425, in Brockholes, Lancashire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Brockholes est née en 1365, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas de Brockholes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Singleton en 1395, à Brockholes, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1425, à Brockholes, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Brockholes 1365 in Preston, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Brockholes 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret 30. Sie hat 1395 in Brockholes, Lancashire, England Thomas de Singleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1425 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Brockholes, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Brockholes è nata il nel 1365 nel Preston, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Nicholas de Brockholes, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Singleton nel 1395, nel Brockholes, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1425, nel Brockholes, Lancashire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Brockholes(이)가 1365년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Brockholes(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 랭카실르 브록홀스에서 Thomas de Singleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 영국 랭카실르 브록홀스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas de Singleton em 1395, em Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1425, em Brockholes, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Brockholes родилась в 1365 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Brockholes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Singleton в 1395 г. в местности броккхолесь, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1425 г. в местности броккхолесь, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Brockholes nació en 1365, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas de Brockholes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 30 años.
